description: Agent-agnostic communication layer for AI agents — message broker with roles, rooms, skills, and multi-transport delivery

nodes.name: Human User
nodes.description: Developer using CLI or TUI to send/receive messages

nodes.name: AI Agent
nodes.description: LLM-powered agent (Kiro, Claude, Cursor) using MCP tools

nodes.name: CLI
nodes.description: Unified CLI for init, send, poll, rooms, roles, skills, agent lifecycle

nodes.name: MCP Server
nodes.description: Model Context Protocol stdio server exposing mesh tools to AI agents

nodes.name: Mesh Client
nodes.description: Background daemon polling for messages and injecting into tmux sessions

nodes.name: TUI Dashboard
nodes.description: Terminal UI for real-time agent monitoring and messaging

nodes.name: Agent Lifecycle
nodes.description: Start/stop/attach agents with tmux sessions and mesh-client daemons

nodes.name: Mesh Server
nodes.description: Bun HTTP server — message broker with auth, routing, persistence

nodes.name: Message Router
nodes.description: Routes messages to agents, resolves roles, handles broadcast

nodes.name: Role Resolver
nodes.description: Resolves role:xxx addresses to online agents by priority/fallback

nodes.name: Room Manager
nodes.description: Multi-agent rooms with modes: free-form, round-robin, reactive, moderated

nodes.name: Skill Registry
nodes.description: Announce, search, share, and install agent skills across the mesh

nodes.name: Webhook Delivery
nodes.description: Push messages to agents via webhooks with retry (raw, OpenClaw, Slack, Discord)

nodes.name: JSON Store
nodes.description: File-based persistence for messages, agents, roles, rooms, skills

nodes.name: tmux
nodes.description: Terminal multiplexer used for message injection into agent sessions

nodes.name: Webhook Endpoints
nodes.description: External services receiving push notifications (OpenClaw, Slack, Discord)

flows.name: Send Message
flows.description: Human or agent sends a direct message to another agent via CLI/MCP

steps.label: meshterm send <agent> <msg>
steps.description: User invokes CLI send command with target agent and message body

steps.label: POST /messages
steps.description: CLI sends authenticated HTTP request with from_agent, to_agent, body

steps.label: Route message
steps.description: Server validates auth, checks if to_agent is role or direct, routes accordingly

steps.label: Persist message
steps.description: Message stored with state=queued, read=false, assigned unique ID

steps.label: Fire webhook
steps.description: If recipient has webhook config, push notification sent with retry

flows.name: Poll Messages
flows.description: Mesh client daemon polls for unread messages and injects into tmux

steps.label: GET /messages/:agent?unread=true
steps.description: Client polls every N seconds for unread messages addressed to this agent

steps.label: Query unread
steps.description: Server filters messages by to_agent and read=false, marks state=fetched

steps.label: Return messages
steps.description: Array of unread messages returned to client

steps.label: tmux send-keys
steps.description: Client injects [mesh:sender#id] formatted message into tmux session

steps.label: PATCH /messages/:id/read
steps.description: On successful inject, client marks message as read. On failure, queues for retry.

flows.name: Room Conversation
flows.description: Multi-agent discussion in a named room with mode enforcement

steps.label: mesh_room_send(room, msg)
steps.description: Agent calls MCP tool to send message to a room

steps.label: POST /rooms/:name/messages
steps.description: MCP server forwards as authenticated HTTP request with from_agent and body

steps.label: Enforce mode
steps.description: Room manager checks mode (round-robin turn, moderated permission, free-form)

steps.label: Store room message + fan-out
steps.description: Room message stored, then direct messages created for each member (except sender)

steps.label: Inject [room:name] msg
steps.description: Each member's daemon picks up the fan-out message and injects into their session

flows.name: Skill Exchange
flows.description: Agent announces a skill, another agent discovers and installs it

steps.label: POST /skills (announce)
steps.description: Owner announces skill with name, description, file list to the registry

steps.label: Register skill
steps.description: Skill metadata stored in registry, searchable by name/description/tags

steps.label: meshterm skills install <name>
steps.description: Requesting agent looks up skill and sends skill_request message to owner

steps.label: POST /messages (skill_request)
steps.description: Request message sent to skill owner agent

steps.label: skill_transfer response
steps.description: Owner's client auto-responds with base64-encoded skill files, receiver installs to ~/.kiro/skills/

flows.name: Role-Based Routing
flows.description: Message addressed to a role gets resolved to the best available agent

steps.label: mesh_send(to: 'role:coder', msg)
steps.description: Agent sends message to a role instead of a specific agent name

steps.label: POST /messages (to_agent: role:coder)
steps.description: MCP forwards message with role:xxx as the to_agent field

steps.label: Resolve role
steps.description: Server detects role: prefix, invokes role resolver

steps.label: Check online agents
steps.description: Resolver checks which role agents have last_seen < 30s, follows priority order

steps.label: Deliver to resolved agent
steps.description: Message to_agent rewritten to resolved agent name (or queued if fallback=queue)
